ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social security number of the customer (encrypted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings, credit) */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance of the account */,
  "limit" TEXT /* Credit limit of the account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive, closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the entry belongs to */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Account balance at the time of update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the account balance was updated */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "transaction_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_history_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the entry belongs to */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the customer */,
  "income_date" TEXT /* Date the income was recorded */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Source of the income (e.g., salary, investment) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the income entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the entry belongs to */,
  "balance_hat" TEXT /* Predicted account balance */,
  "residual" TEXT /* Residual value of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the prediction entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_scores" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk score entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the entry belongs to */,
  "risk_score" TEXT /* Risk score assigned to the customer */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the risk score was assigned */,
  "score_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the assigned risk score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the risk score entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_scores_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., junior, senior, lead) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analyst record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analyst record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the transaction belongs to */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_financial_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial profile */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the profile belongs to */,
  "profile_data" TEXT /* JSON-formatted data containing detailed financial information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_financial_profiles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who accessed the data */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer whose data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)
